tool.name: OGS: PVD2XDMF
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'PVD2XDMF'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $pvd_file: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for pvd2xdmf #for $m in $pvd_file: "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for --output-directory output_1.data
tool.help: This tool runs the **PVD2XDMF** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
